title: State Snapshot
description: Frozen view of an entity's state at a specific time. Snapshots capture properties, metric values, structural fingerprint, and variable bindings. Used for drift detection by comparing successive snapshots.

entity_id.description: Entity UID or name this snapshot represents

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when snapshot was taken

properties.description: Entity properties at snapshot time (promotion_status, tier, ci_workflow, etc.)

metric_values.description: Numeric metric values at snapshot time

structural_fingerprint.description: Hash of the entity's structural position (hierarchy + relations)
